recipe.title: Chocolate brownie
recipe.description: This easy chocolate brownie recipe is an indulgent and delicious treat. A warm chocolate brownie served with ice cream, caramel popcorn and crushed hazelnuts.

steps.descr: Tear off a large piece of greaseproof paper, scrunch it...
steps.instructions: Tear off a large piece of greaseproof paper, scrunch it up under cold water, then unfold and use it to line a 20cm square baking tin.

on_enter.say: Tear off a large piece of greaseproof paper, scrunch it up under cold water, then unfold and use it to line a 20cm square baking tin.

steps.descr: Snap the chocolate into a heatproof bowl, dice the...
steps.instructions: Snap the chocolate into a heatproof bowl, dice the butter and add with a pinch of sea salt. Melt over a pan of gently simmering water, stirring regularly, then remove from the heat and leave to cool slightly.

on_enter.say: Snap the chocolate into a heatproof bowl, dice the butter and add with a pinch of sea salt. Melt over a pan of gently simmering water, stirring regularly, then remove from the heat and leave to cool slightly.

steps.descr: Crack the eggs into a large bowl, then add the sugar and...
steps.instructions: Crack the eggs into a large bowl, then add the sugar and whisk until light, pale and fluffy.

on_enter.say: Crack the eggs into a large bowl, then add the sugar and whisk until light, pale and fluffy.

steps.descr: Sieve in the flour, followed by the cocoa
steps.instructions: Sieve in the flour, followed by the cocoa. Whisk to combine, then fold through the melted chocolate.

on_enter.say: Sieve in the flour, followed by the cocoa. Whisk to combine, then fold through the melted chocolate.

steps.descr: Spoon the mixture into the lined tin and spread it out...
steps.instructions: Spoon the mixture into the lined tin and spread it out evenly. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until crisp on the outside but slightly wobbly.

on_enter.say: Spoon the mixture into the lined tin and spread it out evenly. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until crisp on the outside but slightly wobbly.

steps.descr: Leave to cool in the tin for 15 minutes before slicing...
steps.instructions: Leave to cool in the tin for 15 minutes before slicing and serving warm – delicious with vanilla ice cream, crushed hazelnuts and caramel popcorn.

on_enter.say: Leave to cool in the tin for 15 minutes before slicing and serving warm – delicious with vanilla ice cream, crushed hazelnuts and caramel popcorn.
